red_herring.value: Raskolnikov's erratic behavior and appearance leads bystanders to falsely assume he's a pickpocket or drunk beggar
red_herring.quote: A pickpocket I dare say. Pretending to be drunk, for sure, and getting under the wheels on purpose

social_world.value: Russian class hierarchy evident in family dynamics, poverty, and social expectations around marriage and propriety
social_world.quote: so poor that they lived with their five children in only two rooms

media_and_audience.value: Public perception shapes interpretation of events - crowd assumes Raskolnikov is criminal based on appearance
media_and_audience.quote: From his dress and appearance they might well have taken him for a beggar asking alms in the streets

investigator_wound.value: Raskolnikov's psychological torment and guilt manifest as physical and mental deterioration
investigator_wound.quote: he suddenly felt someone thrust money into his hand. He looked... still looking angry and bewildered

_meta.title: ebook fyodor dostoyevsky crime and punishment
